subject: SCIENCE
title: Physical properties of
objective: Physical properties of — describe the physical properties of solid materials, such as hard, shiny, or stretchable;
introduction: Did you know that science happens all around you, every single day? 🌍 In 'Physical properties of 5. describe the', you'll discover something amazing about our world. Curiosity ON!

vocabulary.definition: Kung ano ang gawa ng isang bagay — kahoy, metal, plastic.
Materyal na may tiyak na hugis, tulad ng bato.
